author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev, creator David DM http://david-dm.org, co-creator & organiser @NodeBotsUK & @MeteorLondon meetups. Owner TABLEFLIP https://tableflip.io
author.name: Alan Shaw

content.text: .@olizilla and I are building `chrome.protocol.registerStreamProtocol` in @brave and it actually now streams files **directly** from our #IPFS node via the #ipfsCompanion web extension. THIS IS A BIG EXCITEMENT FOR ME :D
content.html: .@olizilla and I are building `chrome.protocol.registerStreamProtocol` in @brave and it actually now streams files **directly** from our #IPFS node via the #ipfsCompanion web extension. THIS IS A BIG EXCITEMENT FOR ME :D
